summary: Complete testing of Golf Groups bug fixes in Trip Planner wizard. All 6 bug fixes verified working correctly via Playwright UI testing.

bug_fix_1_budget_label.requirement: Budget label should say 'per person / day' (not 'per person')
bug_fix_1_budget_label.evidence: Label shows 'BUDGET PER PERSON / DAY' when Golf Groups selected

bug_fix_3_hotel_suggestions.requirement: Hotel suggestions should show for golf groups (prioritizing hotels nearest to golf courses)
bug_fix_3_hotel_suggestions.evidence: Step 3 shows 'Pleta de Mar' hotel with '2km to Capdepera Golf' info

bug_fix_4_nearest_golf_card.requirement: Step 3 should show hotel with nearest_golf info when Golf Groups + Hotel selected
bug_fix_4_nearest_golf_card.evidence: Nearest Golf Course card shows 'Capdepera Golf' with '2km · 18 holes · Par 72 · From €59' and 'Book Tee Time' button

bug_fix_5_missing_hint.requirement: Missing fields hint should show when Next is disabled
bug_fix_5_missing_hint.evidence: Shows 'Select a service' initially, then 'Select group type, number of players, budget' after Golf Groups selected

bug_fix_6_close_button_step1.evidence: Close button (X Close) visible at bottom-left of Step 1

bug_fix_7_back_button.requirement: Back button should be visible on all steps > 1
bug_fix_7_back_button.evidence: Back button visible on Step 2, Step 3, and Step 4

bug_fix_8_budget_summary_format.requirement: Step 4 summary shows budget as '/pers/day' format for golf groups

full_wizard_flow.requirement: Full wizard flow: Golf Groups + Hotel → select society, 12-20, premium budget → Step 2 dates → Step 3 itinerary with hotel → Step 4 with group name field
full_wizard_flow.evidence: Complete flow tested successfully: Step 1 (Golf Groups + Hotel + Society + 12-20 + Premium) → Step 2 (dates selected) → Step 3 (hotel with nearest golf shown) → Step 4 (Society/Club name field + /pers/day budget format)

passed_tests: Budget label shows 'BUDGET PER PERSON / DAY' when Golf Groups selected
Hotel suggestions show for golf groups with nearest golf course info
Nearest Golf Course card appears in Step 3 with distance, holes, par, price
Missing fields hint shows when Next is disabled
Budget shows '/pers/day' format in Step 4 summary
Group name field shows 'Society / Club name' placeholder
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Golf Groups bug fixes verified working. Key data-testids used: nav-plan-trip, service-golf_groups, service-hotel, group-type-society, players-12-20, budget-premium, budget-moderate, budget-luxury, missing-hint, trip-close-step1-btn, trip-back-btn, trip-next-btn, trip-planner-step-3, nearest-golf-card, trip-group-name. The hotel prioritization for golf groups works correctly - hotels with nearest_golf field are shown with distance info and a 'Nearest Golf Course' card appears below the hotel card.
